title: Screamer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Screamer''' can refer to:
*[[Screamer gong]]
*[[Screamer Squadron (New Republic)|Screamer Squadron]]
*[[Screamer Squadron (Rebel Alliance)]]
*[[Screamer (Nagai starfighter)|''Screamer'']] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] which belonged to [[Lumiya]]
*[[Screamer jet pack]]
*[[Greel screamer]]
*[[Smoke screamer]]
*[[Sonic detonator]]s were sometimes referred to as "sonic screamers" or just "screamers"
*An alternative name for the [[teezl]]
{{Disambig}}
